title: THE POD — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8

events.text: I'm standing close enough to see frost crawling off the glass.
There is a body shape inside. Not a shadow. Not a reflection.
I want to move closer. I also want to run until the station runs out of floor.
Operator, pick one before I do something stupid with confidence.

events.title: MAYA APPROACHING OPEN POD
events.subtitle: Crossing exposed platform toward cryostasis chamber

events.text: My boots are sticking to the deck. Condensation froze in patches.
If I fall in front of the most important corpse-or-not-corpse in history, delete the footage.
I hate it. Which probably means it's the correct call.

events.title: POD CHANNEL STABILIZATION
events.subtitle: Filtering cryostasis telemetry from contaminated audio carrier

events.text: Channel is cleaner. The pod sounds like someone breathing through a wall.
Before anyone touches the chamber: scan first.
Cryostasis is not sleep. It is a machine convincing a body not to leave.
Wake it wrong and you can save the lungs while losing the person.
I said what my fear said before my manners caught up.
events.speaker: HALE

events.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
events.subtitle: Reading heartbeat, neural activity and chamber stability

events.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
events.content:
NAME: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: ALIVE
HEARTBEAT: DETECTED
NEURAL ACTIVITY: LOW BUT PRESENT
CRYOSTASIS STATE: UNSTABLE
WAKE RISK: HIGH
PRESERVATION RISK: RISING
events.caption: Medical scan recovered from emergency pod system.
events.message: [OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: I need everyone to understand that I am holding onto that word with both hands.

events.title: CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING
events.content:
LOCK STATE: ACTIVE
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
INSTRUCTION: DO NOT WAKE
REQUESTED BY: ETHAN HALE
OVERRIDE STATUS: AVAILABLE
WARNING: MANUAL OVERRIDE MAY TRIGGER NEURAL SHOCK
events.caption: Cryostasis warning recovered from pod control layer.
events.message: [CRYOSTASIS LOCK WARNING ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Ethan's name is on the lock.
You keep saying that like reasons don't leave bodies behind.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: Missing file. Eighth slot. Alive in a pod that Hale ordered locked.
I don't know whether to laugh, scream, or punch the glass until my hand stops being useful.
I locked him because he asked me to.
Noah was awake for maybe thirty seconds.
Long enough to know he was terrified.
He looked at me and said, 'If I start making sense, don't trust me.'
No. You let the room say it for you.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Scared enough to pretend it's only anger.
Noah used to sing during reboots.
Like the song owed him money.
If that's him in there, I don't get to choose the easier version of grief.
Slow wake keeps Noah's brain safer.
But the chamber is failing while we wait.
Hard wake gets him out fast.
But it could break something inside him we can't patch.
And the Black Box storage is tied into the wake cycle.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Slow wake may corrupt part of the Black Box.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: So we pick what we can live with.

events.title: SLOW WAKE PROTOCOL
events.subtitle: Gradual neural recovery while chamber storage degrades

event.speaker: HALE
event.text: Keep it slow. Let his brain catch the room before the room catches him.

events.text: But it looked like a person trying to come back.
Black Box just lost a chunk.
events.speaker: HALE

events.title: HARD WAKE PROTOCOL
events.subtitle: Emergency neural activation and rapid chamber vent

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Noah, if you can hear me, I'm sorry.

events.text: I do not care about clean right now.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I was really hoping I was.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Fast answers are how this place lies.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Don't let him near the black box.
That isn't a phrase. Why did I say that?
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Do not turn him into your report.
events.speaker: MAYA

events.text: I remember Hale's hand on the lock.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: And now I remember waking wrong.
events.speaker: NOAH

choices.text: NOAH, WE HAD TO RISK IT.

events.text: Then do not let him near the black box.
You always were dramatic after naps.
events.speaker: HALE

events.text: Or enough of him to be dangerous.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Noah. Look at me if you can.
Alive is a suspiciously strong word for how I feel.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: You sound like every person who ever made a bad call and survived long enough to name it necessity.
So I will be angry later.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Right now I need the black box.
events.speaker: NOAH

events.text: It heard the command that started Alpha.
Before the station learned how to clean the lie.
Of course it is under the thing trying to kill us.
events.speaker: HALE

events.title: MAYA RETRIEVING BLACK BOX
events.subtitle: Manual extraction beneath unstable pod cradle

event.text: Back out if it moves again.
event.speaker: HALE

events.text: Got it. Also lost a glove seam. If I start leaking atmosphere, complain loudly.

events.title: REMOTE ARM EXTRACTION
events.subtitle: Guiding damaged manipulator beneath pod cradle

event.text: Noah, can you see the cradle from inside?
event.speaker: MAYA

event.text: I can see frost. I can see my hands. I would rather see neither.
event.speaker: NOAH

events.text: Arm has it. Slow, but clean. For once, a machine behaved like it had parents.
events.speaker: HALE

events.title: BLACK BOX RECORDER
events.content:
RECOVERY STATUS: PARTIAL
DECRYPTION MODULE REQUIRED
LINKED SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
LINKED EVENT: INCIDENT ALPHA
WARNING: access may expose suppressed command audio.
INDEX ANOMALY: crew count mismatch detected.
RECOVERED FRAGMENT: '...not eight... nine...'
events.caption: Recovered black box recorder connected to Incident Alpha. Crew count mismatch detected.
events.message: [BLACK BOX RECORDER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: NOAH WAS NOT THE MISSING ONE

designRulesApplied: Somut hedef korunur: podu yönet, Noah'ı uyandır, Black Box'ı çıkar, Episode 11'e büyük soru bırak.
UNKNOWN artık generic korku değil; log çelişkisi, Hale'in kilidi ve dokuzuncu kişi gizemini ileri iter.
Slow Wake ve Hard Wake gerçek geri dönülmez consequence üretir.
Slow Wake Noah'ı daha stabil bırakır ama Black Box'ın %40'ını kalıcı bozar.
Hard Wake Black Box'ı daha temiz korur ama Noah neural damage alır.
Hale baskı altında savunmacı ve yaralı konuşur.
Noah önce insan gibi uyanır; bilgi sonra gelir.
Final cliffhanger sekiz ekipten dokuz ekibe genişler.
Episode 11 için açık chain-effect flagleri eklenmiştir.

episodeObjective: Manage the opened pod, decide how Noah Voss wakes, expose Hale's role without turning the scene into exposition, create irreversible Slow Wake / Hard Wake consequences, recover the Black Box, and end with a larger Episode 11 question.

summary: UNKNOWN messages now push story instead of generic fear.
Slow Wake and Hard Wake create irreversible consequences.
Hale reacts defensively when pressured instead of staying professionally controlled.
Noah wakes as a damaged person first and a lore source second.
Black Box recovery carries different consequences depending on wake path and retrieval method.
Final cliffhanger expands the mystery from eight crew to nine.
Every visible choice set has exactly two options.
All major choices produce flags for Episode 11.

episode11UsageNotes.blackBoxCorrupted: Episode 11 decryption should have missing/corrupted audio if Slow Wake was chosen.
episode11UsageNotes.noahNeuralDamage: Episode 11 Noah should have sensory errors, memory skips, or unstable speech if Hard Wake was chosen.
episode11UsageNotes.haleDefensiveState: Hale should be more defensive if the operator pressured him about the lock.
episode11UsageNotes.mayaGroundedByOperator: Maya should show more trust if the operator grounded her before wake decision.
episode11UsageNotes.mayaGloveDamaged: Manual Black Box pull leaves Maya physically at risk.
episode11UsageNotes.remoteArmUsed: Remote arm retrieval is safer but slower and may leave timing consequences.
episode11UsageNotes.crewNineRevealed: Episode 11 must open with the nine-crew contradiction active.
